sections.paragraph:
γνώριμος, ον (Pla.+; OGI 90, 53 [196 b.c.]; PCairZen 225, 4 [253 b.c.] al.; LXX; Just.; ParJer 5:7) acquainted with w. dat. of pers. (Pla., 7th Epistle, 324d γνώριμοι ἐμοί; PTebt 286, 6; 703, 55; Ruth 2:1; 4 Macc 5:4) J 18:16 v.l. παρὰ τῶν ἐκείνοις γνωρίμων of those who were acquainted with them (the apostles) Papias (2:2).—DELG s.v. γιγνώσκω p. 225.

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

dat. dat. = dative

pers. pers. = person(s)

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 203
